confirmed_functional_facts.fact: B11 is the regulation amplifier fed from the B6 signal amplifier output, so the control path is feedback, not arbitrary feed-forward.
confirmed_functional_facts.modeling_consequence: Future active closure must derive B11 drive from the B6 output node and cannot keep a free detector drive as proof.

confirmed_functional_facts.fact: The B11 output is followed by a silicon rectifier that produces the DC control voltage.
confirmed_functional_facts.modeling_consequence: The detector path must be part of the offline active reference before C11/CMD dynamics can be promoted.

confirmed_functional_facts.fact: In compressor mode, the rectified DC control voltage is sent directly to the gain-control diode bridge.
confirmed_functional_facts.modeling_consequence: A compressor-mode candidate may bypass the limiter zener, but only after S7 contacts are proven.

confirmed_functional_facts.fact: In limiter mode, a ZL10 zener is inserted so regulation starts close to nominal output.
confirmed_functional_facts.modeling_consequence: D1_ZL10 has a functionally confirmed limiter-threshold role with BV around 10 V as a candidate model parameter.

confirmed_functional_facts.fact: The text says the zener is short-circuited by a switch in compressor mode.
confirmed_functional_facts.modeling_consequence: S7 has a functionally confirmed D1-bypass role candidate, but the exact 17/18/19 contact truth table still comes from the schematic.

confirmed_functional_facts.fact: The regulation-amplifier input divider can bypass a resistance with a capacitor for FM pre-emphasis.
confirmed_functional_facts.modeling_consequence: S6/S7 must be treated as a mode-dependent pre-emphasis and command-routing switch matrix, not a single RC shortcut.

confirmed_functional_facts.fact: Each audio gain-control bridge branch uses one germanium diode plus one silicon diode in series.
confirmed_functional_facts.modeling_consequence: The B6 gain bridge should use the Siemens empirical branch law or a Ge+Si equivalent, not a generic four-silicon-diode shortcut.

b11_scientific_activation_research_ledge.authority: This ledger records source-backed modelling requirements for the next guarded activation step. It does not promote topology, diode polarity, BJT pins, or official B11 components.

source_policy.acceptable_for_stamp_equations: primary papers, simulator manuals, and manufacturer/component datasheets or scans
source_policy.acceptable_for_component_identity: model-specific museum/manufacturer literature can identify old parts when manufacturer datasheets are missing
source_policy.not_acceptable_for_promotion: forum substitutions, marketplace AI summaries, and unsourced equivalents can only create test hypotheses

scientific_sources.finding: Modified nodal analysis is the correct equation framework for circuits with voltage sources and current-defined branches.
scientific_sources.project_consequence: Keep B11 activation inside the existing MNA residual/Jacobian path rather than building an ad-hoc detector law.

scientific_sources.finding: SPICE diode models use IS/N/RS plus optional reverse breakdown parameters BV and IBV; BJT models expose NPN/PNP device models with nonlinear DC and charge parameters.
scientific_sources.project_consequence: D1_ZL10 cannot be represented by the current forward-only Shockley diode. Add an optional zener breakdown branch before any D1 stamp experiment.

scientific_sources.finding: Nonlinear state-space models can be derived from schematics while separating linear state evolution from nonlinear device currents.
scientific_sources.project_consequence: Use this only after offline B11 MNA closure. It is a reduction path for realtime, not a substitute for proving B11 topology.

netlist.title: Siemens U273 B6 parametric bridge DC netlist
notes: Local B6 operating point driven by a finite B11/S6/S7 Thevenin command source.
C1 is corrected to the complete B6 schematic value 0.68 uF; it does not enter this DC solve.
C4/C6 are adjustment capacitors and are open for DC.
Bridge diodes use the Siemens empirical U_D/I_D/r_d law from the U273 notes.
netlist.commandDcModel: B11/S6/S7 Thevenin source 1 V through 10000 Ohm

parameters.adjustmentModel: R7/R8 are effective two-terminal resistances unless alpha7/alpha8 is explicitly supplied as a rheostat simplification.
